content: Phase 1: Backend FastAPI - Setup, Auth, Media Stream endpoints (Direct Play + HLS + French auto-select)
Phase 1: Frontend React - Port all components, pages, contexts

Phase 2: Radarr/Sonarr integration in Setup + Media Detail
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with testing agent
